Article Title: Vaibhav Sooryavanshi on the verge of breaking Sachin Tendulkar's 36-year-old India record
Article Text:
Vaibhav Sooryavanshi (BCCI Photo)

Sooryavanshi's remarkable rise



A chance to break Sachin Tendulkar 's record



'Words cannot explain it': Sooryavanshi



Will the wait end in Belfast?



Poll Vote & Share your view Do you think young players should get early opportunities in international cricket? Yes, If they earn it. No, Experience should come first. 3k+ users shared opinion today 5k+ users already voted today 3k+ users shared opinion today Share Opinion

India vs Ireland T20Is: Squads

India

Ireland

NEW DELHI: All eyes will be on 15-year-old Vaibhav Sooryavanshi when India take on Ireland in the first T20I of the two-match series in Belfast on Friday.The teenage batting sensation has become one of the biggest talking points in world cricket, with fans eagerly waiting to see if he will make his India debut. If he gets a game, Sooryavanshi will create history by becoming the youngest player to represent India in men's international cricket.Sooryavanshi earned his maiden senior call-up after an impressive IPL 2026 season. Playing for Rajasthan Royals, he scored 776 runs in 16 innings at a staggering strike rate of 237. He also smashed 72 sixes, setting a new record for the most sixes in a single IPL season.The youngster carried his form into the India A tri-series in Sri Lanka. In the one-day final against Sri Lanka A in Dambulla, he blasted 94 off just 29 balls, once again showing why he is regarded as one of the brightest young talents in the game.At 15 years and 71 days, Sooryavanshi became the youngest player ever to be selected in India's senior men's squad, breaking Sachin Tendulkar's 36-year-old record.Tendulkar made his international debut in 1989 against Pakistan at the age of 16 years and 205 days.If Sooryavanshi is included in the playing XI against Ireland, he will surpass the batting legend to become India's youngest men's international cricketer.Speaking after receiving his maiden India call-up, Sooryavanshi described wearing the India jersey as a dream come true."Words cannot explain it. The reason I picked up the bat from day one and went to the ground for practice: that dream is fulfilled now. The biggest step in that journey was completed today. I truly cannot put this feeling into words," he said in a video shared by the BCCI.The teenager admitted he was overwhelmed when he first saw the India jersey."I felt like a dream when I saw that T-shirt; I couldn't stop smiling. Sometimes things happen that you never imagined could happen. When it finally does, you don't know how to react. That was exactly how I felt," he added.Whether he makes his debut on Friday or later in the series, excitement around Sooryavanshi continues to grow. For now, the biggest question ahead of India's clash against Ireland remains the same: Will the 15-year-old get his first India cap?: Shreyas Iyer (captain), Tilak Varma (vice-captain), Ravi Bishnoi, Abhishek Sharma, Suryansh Shedge, Prasidh Krishna, Sanju Samson, Axar Patel, Harshit Rana, Ishan Kishan, Washington Sundar, Arshdeep Singh, Shivam Dube, Prince Yadav, Vaibhav Sooryavanshi.: Lorcan Tucker (captain), Ross Adair, Ben Calitz, Gareth Delany, George Dockrell, Stephen Doheny, Matthew Humphreys, Gavin Hoey, Matthew Hollard, Liam McCarthy, Jai Moondra, Harry Tector, Tim Tector, Reuben Wilson.
Article Summary: India take on ireland in the first t20i of the two-match series in belfast on friday. All eyes will be on 15-year-old vaibhav sooryavanshi. If he gets a game, he will become the youngest player to represent india in men's international cricket.

Article Title: NFL Trade Rumors: Pittsburgh Steelers and Green Bay Packers linked to $42M Colts star amid growing uncertainty
Article Text:

Which teams are interested in Jonathan Taylor?

What insiders are saying about the trade rumors?

Contract details and salary cap implications

How could the trade impact both teams?



The Indianapolis Colts are entering one of the most important seasons of their current rebuild, but growing uncertainty around Jonathan Taylor has started fueling fresh NFL trade rumors. While Taylor remains one of the league’s most productive backs, his contract situation and Indianapolis’ shaky long-term outlook have opened the door for speculation.Taylor is entering the final year of his three-year, $42 million extension and is reportedly still seeking another deal. According to Garrett Podell of CBS Sports, Taylor could emerge as a “Giannis-like” trade candidate if Indianapolis struggles early in 2026. With pressure mounting on head coach Shane Steichen and general manager Chris Ballard, the possibility of a major roster reset cannot be ruled out.The Pittsburgh Steelers have quietly surfaced as one of the more interesting fits. On paper, their backfield is stable with Jaylen Warren and veteran Rico Dowdle, but this is highly dependent on how healthy and productive the group remains. If injuries hit or if Aaron Rodgers keeps Pittsburgh in serious playoff contention, adding Taylor would instantly transform their offense into one of the most balanced in football.The Green Bay Packers may be an even more logical fit. With uncertainty surrounding Josh Jacobs due to off-field issues and potential suspension, Green Bay may need a contingency plan. Taylor’s explosive style would fit perfectly into Matt LaFleur’s system, especially for a team trying to keep pace in the NFC. The Chicago Bears have also been loosely connected. Their offense is building around Caleb Williams , and pairing him with a premier runner like Taylor would significantly raise their playoff ceiling.Podell’s comparison is what makes this situation interesting. He compared Taylor’s situation to a “Giannis-like” trade scenario, meaning the player himself is still elite, but the team around him may not be built to maximize his championship window.That’s a strong indicator these NFL trade rumors are more than just offseason noise. Anthony Palacios of Last Word on Sports also pointed out that Indianapolis is on unstable ground. After moving Michael Pittman Jr. earlier this offseason and still lacking consistent offensive firepower, the Colts may be closer to a reset than a playoff run.Palacios also noted that Ballard and Steichen are on the hot seat. That’s important because if Indianapolis starts 3-7 or worse, Taylor immediately becomes their most valuable trade asset. Unlike random trade rumors, this one has real leverage attached to it: contract pressure, front office uncertainty, and a star player approaching free agency.Taylor signed a three-year, $42 million extension with Indianapolis in 2023, carrying an average annual salary of $14 million. For 2026, he is set to earn a base salary of $11.98 million while counting $15.56 million against the cap.That number means a lot. If the Indianapolis Colts trade him during the season, they could clear significant future money while avoiding another expensive extension. Taylor is only 27 and still performing at a high level, which means his next contract could easily push beyond $15 million annually.That’s where these trade chatters become serious. For contenders like Pittsburgh or Green Bay, Taylor would not just be a rental. He would likely arrive expecting an extension, making any trade package much more aggressive.For the Indianapolis Colts, moving Taylor would be a major signal that a rebuild is officially underway. It would give them draft capital, financial flexibility, and the chance to reshape the offense around younger pieces.Meanwhile, for the Pittsburgh Steelers, Taylor would give Aaron Rodgers the kind of elite run support he hasn’t had in years, while easing pressure on the passing game.For Green Bay, he could serve as both insurance and a long-term replacement if Jacobs’ situation worsens. Right now, Taylor remains with the Colts. But as training camp gets closer and contract talks remain unresolved, this is one of the biggest running back situations in the league to watch.
Article Summary: Nfl trade rumors: pittsburgh steelers and green bay packers linked to $42m colts star amid growing uncertainty. The indianapolis colts are entering one of the most important seasons of their current rebuild. Taylor could emerge as a “giannis-like” trade candidate if indianapolis struggles early in 2026.

Article Title: NBA trade speculation gone horribly wrong as Jaylen Brown fires back at ESPN expert with brutal jab
Article Text:
Jaylen Brown. Image via: Winslow Townson-Imagn Images

Jaylen Brown rips analyst following trade speculation

Jaylen Brown (AFP Photo)

Stephen A. Smith reacts to the controversy involving Jaylen Brown



NBA trade speculation surrounding Jaylen Brown took another turn Saturday after the Boston Celtics star publicly pushed back against a controversial evaluation shared by ESPN insider Bobby Marks. Brown responded on social media after Marks revealed that one anonymous NBA analytics staffer viewed the reigning Finals MVP as only the "seventh-best player" on a team.The exchange comes at a time when Brown's future has become one of the NBA offseason's biggest talking points. Recent reports have linked the Celtics forward to blockbuster trade discussions, making every public comment surrounding his value carry added weight as Boston prepares for another pivotal season.Jaylen Brown has remained largely silent throughout months of trade rumors, but he drew the line after Marks recounted an anonymous opinion during an appearance on SiriusXM NBA Radio.“I had one — not an executive, but an analytics guy say that ‘Yeah, we view him as like the seventh-best player on a team,’” Marks said.Marks presented the remark as an example of the varying opinions around the league rather than his own evaluation.Still, the quote quickly spread across social media, prompting Brown to respond directly.In a series of posts on X, Brown defended both his résumé and the winning culture he has helped establish in Boston.“Nobody has won more combined regular season and playoff games since I entered the league 10 years ago,” Brown posted He followed with another pointed message directed at the growing influence of statistical models across the NBA.“Analytics have / are ruining the game we playing AI hoops.”Brown's response reflects a broader debate that has shaped front-office decision making over the past decade. While advanced metrics have become increasingly influential in roster construction and player evaluation, many players continue to argue that leadership, feel for the game and postseason success cannot always be captured by numbers alone.Brown has reportedly surfaced in trade conversations this offseason after Boston explored a potential package for Milwaukee Bucks superstar Giannis Antetokounmpo. Although that pursuit did not materialize, reports have suggested the Celtics remain willing to listen to offers involving Brown if the right opportunity presents itself.That backdrop makes every public assessment of Brown's value more significant.From a production standpoint, Brown is coming off arguably the finest season of his career. The five-time All-Star averaged career highs of 28.7 points, 6.9 rebounds and 5.1 assists while earning Second Team All-NBA honors. With Jayson Tatum sidelined until March while recovering from an Achilles injury, Brown carried much of the offensive burden and helped Boston finish with 57 victories despite significant adversity.Brown has acknowledged before that analytics do not always reflect the way he impacts games.“Maybe the way I play basketball doesn’t jump off the charts analytically to some degree, some capacity,” Brown said earlier this year.“So I can see why people may think that maybe me being put in this (bigger) role, it wouldn’t be successful, but it’s more than meets the eye. So I’ve just been playing my game. I play off rhythm. I play off feel. I play off what I see. And sometimes, that doesn’t show up on the analytics.”That philosophy became more evident last season after Boston adjusted its offensive approach because of injuries. Brown explained that he was no longer discouraged from taking midrange shots and instead had the freedom to attack defenses based on what he saw rather than what the numbers suggested.The anonymous evaluation did not just draw criticism from Brown.ESPN personality Stephen A. Smith, who has frequently questioned aspects of Brown's game in previous seasons, also dismissed the assessment.According to Smith, labeling Brown as the seventh-best player on a team was "utterly ridiculous."The debate is unlikely to disappear anytime soon. Boston's willingness to explore blockbuster trades has naturally fueled questions about Brown's long-term place alongside Tatum, particularly after consecutive postseason disappointments following the franchise's 2024 championship.
Article Summary: Boston celtics forward jaylen brown responded on social media to espn analyst bobby marks' comments. Marks said an anonymous nba analytics staffer viewed brown as only the "seventh-best player" on a team. Brown's future has become one of the nba offseason's biggest talking points.

Erling Haaland is still the man for the headlines, on and off the field. After another successful campaign for both Manchester City and Norway, the striker remains one of football's biggest global attractions thanks to his superb scoring record, long-term contract and growing commercial portfolio. As Haaland’s exploits keep fueling his financial ascent, longtime partner Isabel Haugseng Johansen has quietly built a life out of the spotlight. The pair are one of the most talked-about young families in football.Although Erling Haaland accounts for the overwhelming majority of the household wealth, Isabel Haugseng Johansen has established her own identity through football and private business ventures. As per Celebrity Net Worth, their combined estimated net worth stands at approximately $100.3 million, with Haaland's earnings from football contracts and endorsements forming the foundation of the family's fortune.Haaland’s financial story has run in tandem with his ascent through European football. He started his professional career in Norway with Bryne FK and Molde before a breakout spell at Red Bull Salzburg led to Borussia Dortmund signing him in early 2020.His rapid development quickly made him one of football’s most valuable players.In 2022, Manchester City paid Haaland’s release clause to bring him to the Premier League . He is believed to be on around £375,000 a week in his first deal, with bonuses related to appearances, goals, trophies and personal awards taking his yearly earnings into the millions.The Norwegian striker was handed a landmark 10-year contract extension by Manchester City in January 2025. He is believed to be on a base salary of around £28m a year, with bonuses taking his annual on-field earnings to around $60m. Including previous deals, Haaland’s career earnings have easily surpassed $150 million.Haaland is much more than a soccer player. His global profile has attracted some of the world’s biggest brands, making him one of the highest paid athletes through commercial partnerships.He still has Nike as his flagship sponsor, along with other deals with Beats by Dre and Breitling that add a nice chunk to his yearly earnings. Industry estimates say his endorsement portfolio generates around $20 million a year, meaning his combined annual earnings, including salaries and bonuses, are close to $80 million.Unlike some athletes who diversify aggressively into multiple businesses, Haaland has largely focused on growing his commercial value through football and endorsements. His long-term Manchester City contract provides financial stability while allowing his investment portfolio to expand over time.Although reports have linked him to private investments, very few details have been publicly disclosed. Most of his wealth continues to stem from elite football contracts and international sponsorship agreements.As Erling Haaland's earnings have continued to soar, so has the couple's lifestyle. Despite having the financial means to indulge in lavish purchases, Haaland and Isabel Haugseng Johansen have largely maintained a private life away from constant media attention.Haaland reportedly owns luxury properties in England and Norway, allowing him to split time between Manchester and his hometown whenever football commitments allow. While exact details of every property remain private, his homes are said to feature modern amenities, spacious grounds and high-end security befitting one of football's biggest stars.Away from real estate, Haaland has developed a reputation for his disciplined lifestyle. He has often spoken about prioritizing recovery, nutrition and meditation, habits that have helped him maintain elite performance levels throughout his career.Although Isabel Haugseng Johansen is widely recognized as Erling Haaland's longtime partner, she has her own background in football. Raised in Bryne, Norway, she played for Bryne FK's women's teams while Haaland progressed through the club's youth system.Following her football career, Johansen reportedly worked part-time in a fashion boutique before choosing to keep an extremely low public profile. Unlike many partners of global sports stars, she has largely avoided influencer culture and has not publicly announced major endorsement deals or business ventures.As a result, most estimates place her net worth between $250,000 and $300,000, primarily derived from her football career, retail work and personal savings.Haaland and Johansen's relationship stretches back long before either became internationally known. Growing up in Bryne, both were immersed in the local football community and developed a friendship through their shared love of the sport.Reports suggest the pair began dating during Haaland's time at Borussia Dortmund, though neither has publicly confirmed when their relationship officially started. Since then, Johansen has occasionally accompanied him to award ceremonies, football matches and major public events while continuing to avoid extensive media attention.Their relationship has been widely praised for remaining grounded despite Haaland's rapid rise to global superstardom.Erling Haaland and Isabel Haugseng Johansen have come a long way together – from childhood friends in Bryne to one of football’s most recognizable couples. Meanwhile Haaland’s record-breaking exploits, lucrative contract with Manchester City and global endorsement portfolio continue to drive his financial success, while Johansen remains a steadying presence away from the spotlight.
Article Summary: Erling haaland and isabel haugseng johansen have built one of football's most talked-about partnerships. The couple welcomed their first son in 2024 and continue to enjoy a family-focused life. Their combined wealth, luxury properties and growing global profile keep them amongfootball's most prominent young couples.

NBA free agency rumors surrounding LeBron James have intensified as the Los Angeles Lakers prepare for a pivotal offseason, with multiple insiders suggesting Miami could emerge as a surprise landing spot if contract negotiations in Los Angeles take an unexpected turn. While James is still believed to prefer remaining with the Lakers, reports indicate that salary, roster priorities, and championship aspirations could shape his next decision.The speculation comes just days before free agency opens. James, who turns 42 next season, remains one of the NBA's most productive stars, leaving contenders closely monitoring whether the four-time champion finishes his career in Los Angeles or reunites with a franchise where he won two NBA titles.The possibility of LeBron returning to South Beach gained traction after Lakers insider Jovan Buha outlined a scenario in which negotiations between James and Los Angeles could become complicated.Speaking on The Herd with Colin Cowherd, Buha emphasized that staying with the Lakers remains the most logical outcome, but he also explained why that could change if the organization prioritizes other roster moves."There’s a lot of projecting," Buha said. "I do believe that his preference would be to remain a Laker, especially at a certain salary, because you don’t have to move. They can pay you the most money. The continuity, the convenience, all that stuff makes a ton of sense."But if the Lakers decide, 'Hey, we’re going to go pursue these restricted free agents or we’re going to make a trade for somebody and now we only have X amount of money left over for you,' I could see that being offensive to LeBron and him just being like, 'All right, well, if you’re going to pay me 15 million or whatever, I’m just going to go get that from Miami or Golden State or San Antonio or somewhere like that.'"Although there has been no indication that Miami is actively pursuing James, the idea has generated widespread discussion because of his history with the franchise and the Heat's need for another elite playmaker following offseason roster changes.The Heat remain one of the most intriguing hypothetical destinations. James won two championships and reached four consecutive NBA Finals during his first stint in Miami from 2010 through 2014 alongside Dwyane Wade and Chris Bosh under team president Pat Riley and head coach Erik Spoelstra.A reunion would also pair James with Giannis Antetokounmpo and Bam Adebayo, giving Miami one of the league's most accomplished frontcourts if such a move were ever to materialize.The conversation has stretched beyond Buha.Colin Cowherd recently argued that Miami could appeal to James for reasons extending beyond basketball.“He likes the warm weather, he’s a golfer now. You can golf year round in Miami… They can't pay him anything in Miami. That's not it. It's about playing with your son."Cowherd added:"Miami is on fire. It’s a fun city, he’s been there... It works... I think LeBron is what they need."Stephen A. Smith also weighed in on the speculation while discussing James' unique standing around the league."If he called Pat Riley and said, listen, I wanna join, I wanna come back and join Giannis and Bam in MIA, you think Riley's gonna tell him no? He ain't gonna tell him no," Smith said on First Take. "So that's what we have to understand. It's not really concerning to me because it's LeBron, and that is his reality. A reality, by the way, that he has earned."Despite the speculation, there remains no public indication that James has requested a move or that the Lakers have decided to move on. Reports simply suggest communication between the two sides has been quiet as Los Angeles prioritizes building around Luka Doncic, Austin Reaves and head coach JJ Redick's preferred roster construction.One reason these rumors continue to circulate is financial flexibility.The Lakers can offer James the largest contract because they hold his Bird rights, making Los Angeles the most financially favorable destination.Miami, meanwhile, is reported to have roughly $18 million in available salary cap space, meaning James would almost certainly need to accept a significant pay cut if he wanted to return to the Heat.Golden State and San Antonio have also surfaced as theoretical destinations should James prioritize another championship opportunity over maximizing salary.Even entering his 22nd NBA season, James continues to perform at an All-NBA level. His production last season reinforced why every contender would have interest should he actually reach the open market.Those numbers explain why James continues to dominate offseason conversations despite approaching his 42nd birthday. For now, league executives continue to view the Lakers as the favorites to retain him, but until a new agreement is finalized, speculation linking the NBA's all-time leading scorer to franchises like Miami, Golden State and even Cleveland is likely to remain one of the defining storylines of free agency.
Article Summary: Nba free agency rumors surrounding lebron james have intensified as the los angeles lakers prepare for a pivotal offseason. James is still believed to prefer remaining with the lakers, but reports indicate that salary, roster priorities, and championship aspirations could shape his next decision.

Article Title: Jon Jones reacts to Dustin Poirier arrest with unexpected words as retired UFC star opens up about alcohol struggle
Article Text:
Jon Jones and Dustin Poirier (Image Via Getty)

Jon Jones says Dustin Poirier should forgive himself after airport arrest

Dustin Poirier admits he needs help as retirement challenges become public

Dustin Poirier’s arrest at Atlanta’s Hartsfield-Jackson Airport on Father’s Day has led to a wider conversation in the MMA world. The retired UFC star was arrested on a public drunkenness charge after he was denied boarding. Police bodycam footage later showed him arguing with airport staff, using c*** words and telling officers, “I’ll fight you right now.” Days later, UFC heavyweight champion Jon Jones shared a thoughtful response, saying the incident should not define Poirier’s life or career. According to TMZ, the bodycam video sparked the latest debate around the former lightweight contender.Reacting to the video, Jon Jones said he did not see the incident as something that should follow Poirier forever. Instead, he described it as a mistake many people can relate to after drinking too much.Jones said, “Give yourself some grace. Don’t beat yourself up over it. We’ve all done dumb things. Stay busy, enjoy retirement and don’t let one bad day become your whole story.”His words stood out because Jones has faced his own legal and alcohol-related problems over the years. Rather than judging Poirier, he spoke from personal experience and encouraged him to move forward instead of living with guilt.The comments quickly divided fans. Some appreciated Jones for showing understanding instead of criticism. Others pointed out the irony of hearing advice from someone who has also dealt with legal troubles in the past.Poirier has not tried to ignore what happened. After the arrest and the release of the bodycam footage, he shared an emotional statement on Instagram.He wrote, “I’m at the point where I need some help, walking away from fighting hasn’t been easy on me and alcohol isn’t the answer. It has ruined my father’s life and I will not allow it to ruin mine, my family deserve me at 100%. I’m trying to do everything I can to get my mind right and take the right next steps.”His message changed the conversation. Instead of focusing only on the arrest, many fans began talking about how difficult retirement can be for fighters who spend years chasing the next fight. Several people praised Poirier for speaking honestly about his struggles, while others said they hoped he gets the support he needs. His openness has also brought more attention to the mental and emotional challenges athletes can face after leaving competition.
Article Summary: Jon jones says dustin poirier should forgive himself after airport arrest. Former ufc star was arrested on a public drunkenness charge. Police bodycam footage later showed him arguing with airport staff, using c*** words and telling officers, “i’ll fight you right now.”

Article Title: George Russell grabs Austrian Grand Prix pole after Max Verstappen crash sparks yellow flag review and stewards decision
Article Text:
George Russell (Image Via Getty)

George Russell stays on pole after Max Verstappen crash sparks late qualifying drama

Lewis Hamilton recovers as Aston Martin and Williams struggle again

“We are getting closer.”

George Russell kept his strong run going by taking pole position for the Austrian Grand Prix on Saturday, even after a late crash by Max Verstappen created confusion in the final moments of qualifying. The Mercedes driver still set the fastest lap at the Red Bull Ring and was later cleared by the stewards after his run was reviewed for a possible yellow flag infringement. Charles Leclerc and Lewis Hamilton completed the top three, while championship leader Kimi Antonelli qualified fourth. Verstappen, despite crashing at the penultimate corner, will start fifth.The final minutes of qualifying were packed with drama. Charles Leclerc had just moved to the top of the timesheets, and Ferrari looked ready to celebrate pole position. But George Russell produced an even quicker lap, beating Leclerc by 0.236 seconds to grab his second straight pole position and the 11th of his Formula 1 career.Soon after Russell crossed the line, Max Verstappen crashed into the barriers at the penultimate corner. The incident brought out yellow flags, leading race stewards to review whether Russell had slowed enough while completing his lap.The stewards noted the possible infringement, but after checking the data, they decided Russell had done nothing wrong.That allowed the British driver to keep pole, giving him another chance to reduce the 50-point gap to teammate and championship leader Kimi Antonelli.Verstappen’s crash ended his final push, but the Red Bull driver still managed to qualify fifth. Behind him, McLaren drivers Lando Norris and Oscar Piastri finished sixth and seventh.Lewis Hamilton had a difficult start to the final qualifying session after making a mistake on his opening flying lap. However, the Ferrari driver recovered well on his final attempt to secure third on the grid, putting himself in a strong position after winning the Spanish Grand Prix two weeks ago.Kimi Antonelli qualified fourth, keeping himself near the front as he continues to lead the championship standings.Further down the order, Aston Martin had another disappointing day. Fernando Alonso and Lance Stroll finished at the bottom of the timesheets, with both drivers more than three seconds slower than Russell on the shortest lap of the Formula 1 calendar. Alonso tried to stay positive over team radio, saying,However, the results showed the team still has plenty of work to do.Williams also struggled to meet expectations. Carlos Sainz could only manage 17th place, with teammate Alex Albon one spot behind him. It was another frustrating qualifying session for a team that had hoped to move forward this season under team principal James Vowles.
Article Summary: George russell takes pole position for austrian grand prix. Mercedes driver beats ferrari's charles leclerc by 0.236 seconds. Max verstappen crashes into barriers at penultimate corner of qualifying. Stewards review russell's run for possible yellow flag infringement. Lewis hamilton qualifies third, with kimi antonelli fourth.

Article Title: Nick Bosa’s brother Joey Bosa could retire following no team interest in free agency market
Article Text:
Nick Bosa’s brother Joey Bosa could retire following no team interest in free agency market (Image via Getty: Nick Bosa and Joey Bosa)

Buffalo Bills DE and Nick Bosa ’s older brother Joey Bosa is projected to retire at 30 after no free agency signing

Cheryl Bosa wanted Joey Bosa and Nick Bosa to play for San Francisco 49ers

When does age catch up to NFL players?

After several reporters and analysts predicted Buffalo Bills dynamite defensive end Joey Bosa for several NFL teams, and mainly the San Francisco 49ers,it has come to notice that he may retire rather than return to the gridiron for the upcoming 2026 NFL season.ESPN NFL Insider Adam Schefter said, “It is more likely than not that Joey Bosa has played his last NFL down.”NFL Insider Adam Schefter further said that Joey Bosa may not sign with any NFL team before Week 1 of the 2026 season.“Could a situation like the [San Francisco] 49ers come along that entices him enough to come out and play again? Yeah, absolutely!We saw it happen last year with [Indianapolis Colts QB] Philip Rivers, so you never know when a player is fully done and when he’s not done.But the fact of the matter is, I think if the Niners wanted to pair those two together, it probably would have happened already.I think if Joey Bosa wanted to play football, it would have happened already,” Adam Schefter said.The Buffalo Bills pass rusher was linked to several teams, like the Tennessee Titans, Green Bay Packers, Dallas Cowboys, and Seattle Seahawks, but none of those connections came to fruition.Despite having impeccable numbers throughout his 10-year-old NFL career, he remains a free agent in the 2026 offseason.The 30-year-old defensive end recorded 372 total tackles [269 solo, 103 assisted], 77.0 sacks, 22 forced fumbles, 4 passes defended, and 4 fumble recoveries in 122 NFL games.In the 2025 NFL season, Joey Bosa recorded 29 total tackles, 5.0 sacks, 4 forced fumbles, and 2 passes defended in 15 NFL games.Even Joey Bosa and Nick Bosa’s mother, Cheryl Bosa, once posted a photo on her Instagram Story: two brothers clad in San Francisco 49ers gear.She would have wanted her sons to represent one team and not separate teams. Something that Donna Kelce once had to face:Her two popular NFL sons – Jason Kelce and Travis Kelce – faced each other four times on the gridiron.Brothers who grew up playing together had to play on opposing teams. And their dear mother?She resorted to wearing a jacket with half the Philadelphia Eagles jersey [Jason Kelce’s team] and half the Kansas City Chiefs jersey [Travis Kelce’s team].But, but, but. Who is paying heed? Now that the NFL Insider has said it. Now that there’s nothing happening in the San Francisco 49ers universe.Now that the Bosa brothers may not wear the same uniform. Now that former Buffalo Bills defensive end Joey Bosa is predicted to retire…We still have 74 days until the 2026 NFL season begins! Let’s hold our breaths…for the Bosa Brothers’ reunion…Bleacher Report’s Ty Schalter reported in June 2018 that some players seem to turn from stars to has-beens overnight, while some walk away from the game with their powers intact.But when does the age catch up to NFL players? In particular, defensive linemen [now that we have Joey Bosa’s return/retirement in question].Bleacher Report’s Ty Schlater reports that a defensive lineman’s seventh year in the NFL marks the line. After that, his time is very, very short.There is a significant drop-off in the number of qualifying starters from Year 7 to Year 8 and from Year 9 to Year 10.The decline flattens for a while, as the best defensive linemen can stick around a very long time. But the quick development, long plateau, and quick decline are obvious.Joey Bosa has played for 10 long NFL seasons… Is his retirement almost here? Only time will tell…
Article Summary: Nick bosa’s brother joey bosa could retire following no team interest in free agency market. Espn nfl insider adam schefter said, “it is more likely than not thatjoey bosa has played his last nfl down.” the buffalo bills pass rusher was linked to several teams, like the tennessee titans, green bay packers, dallas cowboys, and seattle seahawks.

Article Title: Ethan Quinn’s girlfriend Sidney Fitzgerald stuns in pink bikini while American star reaches Mallorca final against Alejandro Davidovich Fokina
Article Text:
Ethan Quinn (via Getty)

Sidney Fitzgerald enjoys Mallorca sunshine as Ethan Quinn prepares for biggest career final



American tennis star Ethan Quinn is enjoying a dream week at the 2026 Mallorca Championships. The 22-year-old has reached his first ATP Tour-level final after an impressive run on the grass courts in Spain. As Quinn prepares for the biggest match of his career, his girlfriend Sidney Fitzgerald grabbed attention on social media with her latest vacation photos.Fitzgerald shared a series of pictures from Santanyi, a scenic coastal town in Mallorca. The content creator posed in a bright pink bikini while also showing the area’s crystal-clear waters and peaceful surroundings. Her post quickly caught the attention of fans as Quinn continued his strong run in the tournament.Sidney Fitzgerald recently uploaded a carousel of photos on Instagram from her time in Santanyi, Mallorca. The post featured several pictures of her relaxing by the sea in a pink bikini. She also included stunning shots of the town’s turquoise water and natural beauty. Keeping the caption short and playful, Fitzgerald asked her followers to choose between different shades of the ocean by writing, “Sparkling, still, or turquoise?”While Fitzgerald enjoyed the Spanish coastline, Quinn stayed focused on the court.The American has enjoyed a breakthrough week at the ATP 250 event. He defeated Valentin Royer, Murphy Cassone, Vit Kopriva, and Nuno Borges to secure a place in his first ATP Tour-level final.Quinn was especially dominant in the semifinals. He defeated Portugal’s Nuno Borges 6-1, 6-2 in a one-sided contest. The victory gave him plenty of confidence ahead of the championship match.Standing between Quinn and his maiden ATP title is home favorite Alejandro Davidovich Fokina. The Spaniard has much more experience at the highest level and has reached several ATP finals during his career.Davidovich Fokina first played an ATP Tour final at the 2022 Monte-Carlo Masters, where he finished runner-up to Stefanos Tsitsipas. He returned to four more finals in 2025 at Delray Beach, Acapulco, Washington, and Basel, but lost each one. Now ranked World No. 25 after reaching a career-high No. 14 in 2025, the Spaniard will hope that his sixth ATP final finally brings him a first tour-level trophy.The Spaniard had a much tougher semifinal than Quinn. He lost the opening set against Fabian Marozsan before fighting back for a 5-7, 6-2, 6-4 victory. After the match, Davidovich Fokina said he expected a difficult battle against such an attacking opponent. He added that he was pleased with the way he handled the challenge.Davidovich Fokina will enter the Mallorca Championships final as the favorite because of his greater experience and the support of the home crowd. However, Quinn’s impressive performances throughout the week suggest that the young American has every chance of pulling off another upset and lifting the biggest title of his career.
Article Summary: Ethan quinn has reached his first atp tour-level final at the 2026 mallorca championships. The 22-year-old defeated valentin royer, murphy cassone, vit kopriva, and nuno borges to secure his place in the final. Alejandro davidovich fokina is standing between quinn and his maiden atp title.

Article Title: Fact Check: Is Floyd Mayweather Jr vs Manny Pacquiao “$600M fight of the century” rematch postponed or canceled?
Article Text:
Floyd Mayweather Jr vs Manny Pacquiao rematch to break previous $600M ‘Fight of the Century’ record in Las Vegas, Jas Mathur opens up on fight’s preparations (Image via Getty)

Manny Pacquiao’s camp remains hopeful despite exhibition fight delay



The planned rematch between Floyd Mayweather Jr and Manny Pacquiao has been further postponed. This has disappointed boxing fans who were expecting the two legends to meet in Las Vegas on September 19. The event was widely anticipated, but fresh legal and financial issues have forced organizers to delay the contest with no new date confirmed.Despite the setback, Pacquiao’s camp remains hopeful that the fight will eventually happen. In the meantime, the Filipino boxing icon’s team is looking for another opponent to keep him active. Officials believe it is important for Pacquiao to continue fighting while discussions over the long-awaited rematch move forward.Manny Pacquiao’s team has confirmed that the exhibition rematch against Floyd Mayweather Jr will not take place as originally planned. The contest, which was expected to be held on September 19 in Las Vegas, has now been postponed indefinitely because of issues linked to Mayweather’s side.Jas Mathur, the CEO of Manny Pacquiao Promotions, shared that the team is already considering alternative plans. He explained that they are reviewing several possible opponents and opportunities instead of waiting without a clear timeline.According to Mathur, Pacquiao remains under contract, but the team wants to ensure that any replacement fight is the right one. He added that they are also making sure Pacquiao has enough time to prepare properly if the Mayweather bout is eventually confirmed.Reports indicate that the delay is connected to legal and financial disputes involving Mayweather’s camp. A lawsuit seeking millions of dollars over promotional rights has reportedly created uncertainty around the event. Because of these unresolved matters, organizers have decided to pause preparations until the situation becomes clear.Even though the exhibition has been delayed, Pacquiao’s camp believes there is still a strong chance that the fight will happen in the future. Mathur said the team remains positive because there are many reasons for both boxing legends to share the ring again. He pointed out that the original Mayweather-Pacquiao fight took five years to arrange, so delays are not unusual. While he admitted that no one can promise the bout will definitely happen, he stressed that the team is confident negotiations will eventually reach a successful outcome.The first meeting between Mayweather and Pacquiao took place in 2015 and became one of the biggest events in boxing history. It generated huge global interest and record-breaking revenue. Mayweather finished his professional career with an unbeaten 50-0 record. Pacquiao has also remained active in the sport and has repeatedly expressed his willingness to take part in major fights.For now, boxing fans will have to wait for further updates on the proposed rematch. Until the legal and financial issues are resolved, Pacquiao’s attention could shift to another high-profile opponent. His team hopes to keep him active while continuing discussions that could eventually lead to another chapter in one of boxing’s greatest rivalries.
Article Summary: Manny pacquiao’s team has confirmed that the exhibition rematch against floyd mayweather jr will not take place as originally planned. The contest, which was expected to be held on september 19 in las vegas, has now been postponed indefinitely. Reports indicate that the delay is connected to legal and financial disputes involving mayweather's camp.

Article Title: Red Bull F1 CEO Laurent Mekies breaks silence on Max Verstappen’s future amid Oscar Piastri-McLaren transfer rumours ahead of Austrian Grand Prix 2026
Article Text:
Max Verstappen wins Qatar Grand Prix (Image credit: Max Verstappen/Instagram)

Laurent Mekies says Max Verstappen remains committed to Red Bull despite McLaren speculation



Red Bull team principal Laurent Mekies has responded to fresh speculation surrounding Max Verstappen’s future. Reports during the Austrian Grand Prix weekend claimed the four-time Formula 1 world champion could be involved in a sensational swap deal with McLaren’s Oscar Piastri as early as next season.The rumours surfaced as Red Bull continues to face a difficult start to the 2026 campaign. Verstappen has openly expressed his frustration with the team’s lack of pace. However, Mekies insisted that the Dutch driver remains committed to Red Bull and is focused on helping the team return to the front of the Formula 1 grid.Laurent Mekies dismissed the latest reports linking Max Verstappen with a move to McLaren. The Red Bull boss told media that the team is not worried about the rumours because Verstappen has already made his intentions clear.According to Mekies, Verstappen wants to continue with Red Bull. He explained that the driver’s main priority is having a competitive car that can fight for victories and championships. Mekies added that the team fully understands those expectations and is working hard to deliver better performance. A similar statement was issued by Max Verstappen’s manager Raymond Vermeulen.Red Bull introduced a major upgrade package for the Austrian Grand Prix.The update is designed to reduce the extra weight carried by the RB22 and improve its overall pace. The team hopes the changes will help close the gap to the leading teams after a disappointing start to the season.Mekies said there is no need to repeatedly ask Verstappen about his future because the driver has already shared his position with the team. He explained that Verstappen remains fully involved in the development process. The Dutchman continues to provide valuable feedback during race weekends and works closely with the engineers to improve the car.The Red Bull boss also pointed to the recent discussions between Formula 1, the FIA, and the teams regarding future technical regulations. He said the adjustments planned for the 2027 and 2028 seasons are positive for the championship. In his view, the revised rules will benefit talented drivers and create better racing across the grid.Mekies added that Verstappen has played an active role in those discussions by sharing his views on what is needed from future regulations. He believes the open communication between the governing body, Formula 1, and the teams has helped move the sport in the right direction.He also stressed that Red Bull’s full attention is on improving its car rather than responding to transfer speculation. Mekies said Verstappen continues to push the team every weekend and is heavily involved in testing different setups and development ideas to unlock more performance.The Red Bull chief concluded that the solution is simple. If the team can provide Verstappen with a car capable of fighting at the front again, the questions about his future will disappear.
Article Summary: Laurent mekies says max verstappen remains committed to red bull. The dutchman has been linked with a move to mclaren. Mekies said verstappen has already made his intentions clear. He added that the team is working hard to deliver better performance. Red bull introduced a major upgrade for the austrian grand prix.

Article Title: “Mama Gauff is the one”: Coco Gauff’s father gives a hilarious reply after fans credit wife Candi for the family’s athletic success
Article Text:
Coco Gauff greets her mother Candi Gauff and father Corey Gauff (Getty Images)

Corey Gauff reacts after fans praise wife Candi for children’s sporting talent



Coco Gauff continues to shine on the tennis court, while her younger brother Codey Gauff is making a name for himself in baseball . The talented siblings have impressed fans and critics with their achievements at a relatively young age. Their success has drawn attention to the stellar sporting background of the Gauff family.Recently, Coco Gauff's brother Codey Gauff caught the spotlight. He gave an eye-catching display at the MLB Draft Combine. His performance led to praise from baseball fans, with many pointing to the family’s athletic roots. One fan even credited mother Candi Gauff for the children’s sporting talent, prompting a light-hearted response from father Corey Gauff on social media.Codey Gauff continues to build his baseball career while following a different path from his famous sister. Born on September 21, 2007, he developed into a switch-hitting catcher and has represented Elite Squad Academy. In October 2024, he committed to the University of Missouri, one of the respected college baseball programs in the United States.His latest appearance at the MLB Draft Combine earned praise from baseball followers.MLB Pipeline shared clips from his performance and highlighted that although he comes from a well-known sporting family, Codey is creating his own identity in baseball while following the athletic legacy established by his older sister, Coco Gauff.After watching the videos, one fan commented that the family’s sporting ability should mainly be credited to Candi Gauff. The fan suggested that she deserved recognition for raising such gifted athletes.Corey Gauff quickly noticed the comment and responded with his usual sense of humor. He jokingly expressed mock disappointment. He also added a laughing emoji in his "DAMN" comment. His playful reply entertained fans and showed the close bond shared within the Gauff family.The family’s sporting background explains why athletics has always been an important part of their lives. Corey Gauff played basketball at Georgia State University during his college years. Meanwhile, Candi Gauff competed in track and field while attending Florida State University.The youngest sibling, Cameron Gauff, is also interested in sports. Besides tennis, he has participated in football, showing that athletic talent runs throughout the family.While Codey continues working toward his baseball dream, Coco Gauff is preparing for another Wimbledon campaign. The American star recently revealed that she has four different all-white outfits ready for the tournament. She explained that each design has a different style and hopes she stays in the competition long enough to wear every one of them.Gauff also shared that because Wimbledon requires players to wear white, the biggest focus during the design process was making sure every outfit fit her comfortably.Coco Gauff will begin her 2026 Wimbledon journey against world No. 79 Tamara Korpatsch on Monday, June 29.
Article Summary: Coco gauff's brother codey is making a name for himself in baseball. The talented siblings have impressed fans and critics with their achievements. Their success has drawn attention to the stellar sporting background of the gauff family. One fan even credited mother candi gauff for the children’s sporting talent.

Article Title: Tom Brady breaks silence on how his career could have derailed after a doctor's diagnosis sparking outrage
Article Text:
Tom Brady breaks silence on how his career could have derailed after a doctor's diagnosis sparking outrage.(Image via Getty Images)

Tom Brady confesses how his career could have ended much earlier sparking outrage among many



Tom Brady’s confession makes fans furious at the doctors for his misdiagnosis



Tom Brady, the seven time Super Bowl champion, has always been a force to be reckoned with on the field. While he went on to play until he was 45 years old, his recent confession about how his career could have ended early due to a doctor’s diagnosis has sparked outrage among many furious fans.A few hours ago, a confession of Tom Brady on the Stick To Football podcast has resurfaced where he speaks about his injuries.Tom Brady said, “After the season, I tell the doctor, My groin’s just really sore all the time. Every time I move, I can feel it just grab…And the team doctor says we’re going to do an adductor release, we’re going in there and cut the adductor tendon in your groin. We’re also going to cut the other side, so it never becomes a problem”The NFL legend added, “I called Alex…I said, Alex, the doctor told me to do this adductor release. What do you think? He said, Absolutely not. Fly out to LA with me for 3 days and I’ll fix it…”The seven time Super Bowl champion continued, “So I fly out there and worked the adductors, lengthened and softened both muscles, my hips, all my glutes, basically relieved the tension on the tendon. And 3 days later, no more pain…The doctor said there was a 99% chance he’d have to cut my adductor tendon at some point. And to this day, nothing”This has sparked outrage among fans since many feel that the doctor’s misdiagnosis could have ended Tom Brady’s stellar career in the NFL much earlier than he intended to retire.A fan took to X and posted, “Orthos love to cut and rebuild. It’s all they do, and it’s very profitable. When all you have is a hammer, everything looks like a nail.”Another fan wrote, “A surgeon’s job is to try and fix your problem within the scope of their profession. It’s always good to get multiple opinions and branch out in other fields of treatment. Surgery is the last resort.”A third fan posted, “Medicine has become a fraud factory where they tell you (and your insurance) to throw money at fixing symptoms and numbers instead of bothering investigating root causes…”Another fan noted, “Fk doctors and their wealth and arrogance. Doctors are just mechanics for the body. Would you trust any mechanic? They’re just as dumb as a mechanic. It’s just their salary makes people and themselves think they are superior.”The NFL legend Tom Brady has not responded to the comments yet as he remains focused on his career.
Article Summary: Tom brady’s confession makes fans furious at the doctors for his misdiagnosis. The seven time super bowl champion has always been a force to be reckoned with on the field. Tom brady has not responded to the comments yet as he remains focused on his career.

Article Title: Emma Raducanu’s friends spill beans on her secret romance with her new flame John Friend ahead of Wimbledon 2026
Article Text:
Who is Emma Raducanu’s rumored boyfriend? Mystery man seen with tennis star after Queen’s final (Image via Getty)

Emma Raducanu’s new relationship comes during positive career turnaround



Emma Raducanu appears to be enjoying a happier phase in both her personal and professional life ahead of Wimbledon . The 2021 US Open champion was recently seen spending time with former paratrooper John Friend after finishing runner-up at the Queen’s Club Championships. Their relaxed outing has sparked reports that the two are dating.The 22-year-old British tennis star has faced several difficult years since her breakthrough Grand Slam victory. Injuries, frequent coaching changes, and unwanted attention away from the court affected her progress. However, people close to Raducanu believe she is now more settled, confident, and enjoying life again.Emma Raducanu looked cheerful as she walked through Battersea Park with John Friend only hours after her defeat in the Queen’s Club final. The pair appeared comfortable together, leading to fresh speculation about their relationship.According to reports, John Friend, previously served with the elite 4 Para reserve regiment before launching his own public relations business. He has also experienced personal heartbreak over the years after losing his mother and both of his brothers within a short period. Despite those tragedies, he has remained active in charity work and endurance running.People close to Raducanu believe her growing friendship with Friend has come at the right time. One person familiar with the situation told Daily Mail that the tennis star seems far happier than she has been in recent years. They added that she now appears more confident, understands herself better, and has regained the positive energy that people admired during her breakthrough season.Friends also believe the relationship is only one part of her improved mindset. They explained that Raducanu is no longer constantly worrying about every decision and seems much more comfortable with the direction her career is taking. While the relationship is still developing, those around her feel that seeing her happy is the most important thing.Raducanu’s journey since winning the US Open has not been easy. She struggled with injuries, changed coaches several times, and dealt with security concerns involving stalkers.Away from tennis, Raducanu has also reshaped her commercial career. She continues to work with major luxury brands. She keeps adding new partnerships that better reflect her personal interests. She has also spent more time at home and pursued studies outside tennis. This helped to create a healthier balance in her life.Reflecting on her personal growth, Raducanu recently explained that she has become much stronger when making important decisions. She said she no longer feels pressured to choose what others expect and instead trusts her own instincts about the people and opportunities that truly suit her.With Wimbledon approaching, Raducanu enters the tournament in a far more positive place. Whether her renewed confidence leads to success on the court remains to be seen. However, those closest to her believe she is enjoying life again after several challenging seasons.
Article Summary: Emma raducanu seen with former paratrooper john friend after queen’s final. Their relaxed outing has sparked reports that the two are dating. The 22-year-old british tennis star has faced several difficult years since her breakthrough grand slam victory. Injuries, frequent coaching changes, and unwanted attention have affected her progress.

Article Title: ESPN analyst Matt Miller's life threatening accident takes a dark turn as he faces controversial scam allegations
Article Text:
ESPN analyst Matt Miller's life threatening accident takes a dark turn as he faces controversial scam allegations.(Image via Getty Images)

ESPN analyst Matt Miller gets accused of scamming fans as he undergoes surgery for his shoulder



ESPN’s Matt Miller undergoes a second surgery after his devastating accident in Missouri



ESPN analyst Matt Miller has found himself in a troubling situation after he crashed his car into a semi truck in Missouri last week. The accident has been reported to be life threatening as he also ended up losing his left arm. While his family has opened a GoFundMe page to raise funds for his treatments, it seems things have taken a dark turn.In the last few hours, many fans have noticed that the GoFundMe page opened by his family initially had a goal to raise $10,000.While it only took a few hours to reach this goal, the amount was raised to $30,000 and then suddenly to $50,000. This has sparked chaos among fans as many accuse Matt Miller of misusing such funds.To make matters worse, the popular ESPN analyst is also being accused of not paying the winners of fantasy football leagues.A fan took to X and posted, “You drove over a double yellow and you want the public to fund your shit? And you keep moving the money goal higher and higher? Get the f**k outta here you f**king loser.”Another fan wrote, “What about All the people you scammed ?? Any thoughts and prayers for them??”A third fan posted, “Good job getting 50k from random a*s people for your life. ESPN should have taken care of you not random as people…”Another fan wrote, “Why do you keep stealing everyone’s money Matt? Quit posting asking for “prayers” trying to look like a sympathetic figure.You are a piece of sh*t and people are going to find out eventually.”A fifth fan noted, “If I’m reading my timeline correctly, it sounds like this guy is such a scam artist that he might not even been in an accident.”Another fan posted, “Everyone should report this account for trying to scam money for an accident he's responsible for! What a POS!”However, neither ESPN analyst Matt Miller nor his family has responded to the unconfirmed allegations yet.For now, it seems Matt Miller’s focus remains on his recovery as he recently posted about a second surgery that he will go through.On Friday morning, the popular NFL analyst took to X to post, “Today’s surgery is a big one. To find out if my shoulder can be reconstructed in order to support a prosthetic arm. Your continued thoughts and prayers are so appreciated.”While his accident has been controversial, many fans are praying for him to come back to work soon after his life threatening accident.
Article Summary: Espn analyst matt miller's life threatening accident takes a dark turn as he faces controversial scam allegations. His family has opened a gofundme page to raise funds for his treatments. This has sparked chaos among fans as many accuse miller of misusing such funds.

Article Title: Will Nikola Jokic stay with Denver Nuggets? The Serbian superstar’s unexpected move sparks concerns
Article Text:
Nikola Jokic. Image via: Justin Edmonds/ Getty Images

Will Nikola Jokic stay with the Denver Nuggets?



Statistic



2025-26 Season



Points per game



27.7



Rebounds per game



12.9



Assists per game



10.7



Efficiency Rating



37.7



NBA Rebounding Rank



1st



NBA Assists Rank



1st





Why Nikola Jokic's decision is rattling for the Denver Nuggets?



Nikola Jokic of Denver Nuggets (Image via AP Photo)

Nikola Jokic's salary cap and contract implications



Nikola Jokic (Image via USA TODAY Sports)

The question of Nikola Jokic staying with the Denver Nuggets has resurfaced after reports indicated the three-time NBA MVP is once again leaning toward postponing contract extension talks despite becoming eligible for a massive new deal this offseason. The decision does not necessarily signal an intention to leave Denver, but it does increase pressure on the franchise to prove it can build another championship-caliber roster around its cornerstone player.According to NBA insiders Marc Stein and Jake Fischer , Jokic is once again considering delaying extension negotiations with the Nuggets."Jokic informed the Nuggets around this time last year that he preferred to delay contract extension talks for another year," Stein and Fischer noted."The Stein Line has learned that it is under consideration again this summer: Electing to take the same step and holding off on extension talks."The report mirrors what occurred a year ago, when Jokic also declined to immediately negotiate a new deal. At the time, the move made financial sense because waiting allowed him to qualify for a significantly richer extension.Jokic is eligible to sign a four-year contract extension worth approximately $278 million following the conclusion of the 2025-26 season.Even if he waits another year, league rules allow him to pursue essentially the same maximum contract, giving him little financial incentive to rush into an agreement.Jokic has repeatedly expressed his desire to remain in Denver, and there is no indication that he has requested a trade or is preparing to leave.Still, delaying an extension naturally creates uncertainty for a franchise whose championship hopes revolve almost entirely around the Serbian center.The Nuggets understand that Jokic has earned the opportunity to evaluate the team's direction before committing several more years to the organization.Jokic averaged a triple-double for the second straight season while once again finishing among the league's MVP finalists. Few players in NBA history have maintained that level of consistency while carrying such a significant offensive workload.Because of that, many around the league view the latest contract decision less as a warning sign and more as a message to Denver's front office.Financially, the Nuggets remain in a strong position.Jokic is under contract through next season and also holds a player option for the 2027-28 campaign. This summer, he is eligible to sign an extension worth approximately four years and $278 million, depending on how his player option is handled.If he waits until next offseason, he can still negotiate essentially the same maximum extension, eliminating any urgency from his perspective.For Denver, though, every month without a new agreement increases the importance of roster construction.The organization has already indicated it is pursuing trades to improve the supporting cast around Jokic while carefully managing its payroll. Decisions involving veterans, young contributors and future draft assets could ultimately shape not only the 2026-27 season but also whether the franchise secures another long-term commitment from the player who transformed it into an NBA champion.The Nuggets still possess one of basketball's greatest competitive advantages as long as Jokic remains in uniform. The next several months will reveal whether Denver's offseason moves provide enough evidence that another championship window remains wide open before extension talks eventually return to the table.
Article Summary: Nikola jokic is eligible to sign a four-year contract extension worth approximately $278 million following the conclusion of the 2025-26 season. The decision does not necessarily signal an intention to leave denver, but it does increase pressure on the franchise to prove it can build another championship-caliber roster around its cornerstone player.

Article Title: Tyrese Haliburton injury update: Indiana Pacers star drops promising news amid Achilles recovery
Article Text:
Tyrese Haliburton. Image via: Jacob Kupferman/ Getty Images

Tyrese Haliburton gives a major recovery update after Achilles rehabilitation



Tyrese Haliburton of the Indiana Pacers (Image via Getty)

Haliburton's recovery gives Indiana Pacers reason for optimism entering next season



Indiana Pacers’ coach Rick Carlisle drops crucial injury update on key player Tyrese Haliburton (Image Source: Getty)

After a disappointing Indiana Fever year, Tyrese Haliburton is set to make his return to the court in the upcoming season. Haliburton’s injury update brought encouraging news for the Indiana Pacers on Saturday. The franchise point guard said he feels fully healthy more than a year after suffering a torn Achilles tendon in Game 7 of the 2025 NBA Finals.Speaking while hosting his annual youth basketball camp in Indianapolis, Haliburton expressed confidence that he will be ready for the start of the 2026-27 NBA season after missing all of last year during his recovery.Indiana reached the NBA Finals behind its All-Star guard before his devastating injury against the Oklahoma City Thunder ended both his season and the team's championship hopes. Now, with more than three months remaining before training camp, Haliburton believes he is approaching full basketball condition.Haliburton did not hold back when describing where he stands physically after spending the past year recovering from one of basketball's most difficult injuries."My body feels great," Haliburton said. "I feel great moving. I feel great playing. My body just feels great in all honesty.I've never felt this strong. I still gotta get in a little bit of shape but I feel great."It's exciting and it's only what, the end of June here. I still have three more months. I feel like I'm in good shape, NBA shape, but there's a difference between NBA shape and Tyrese Haliburton shape. I'll get there."Haliburton's absence defined Indiana's 2025-26 campaign. After leading the Pacers to their first NBA Finals appearance since 2000, he watched from the sidelines while completing a lengthy rehabilitation program following the Achilles rupture that occurred during the deciding game of the championship series.The guard said the recovery process also included overcoming another unexpected health challenge. A bout with shingles earlier this year affected his appearance and temporarily forced him to gain weight."I look back at videos of me and I can see how swollen my face is," Haliburton said. "I'm glad that's beyond me and past me now. I feel great. My body feels great. I'm able to do everything."I feel like I'm operating like I'm a healthy NBA player for the first time in a long time, which is exciting. The fact that I'm able to come here without having to answer questions from anybody in our organization about my health, that I'm just able to jump in and do some things with the kids, that means the world to me. It's something I don't take for granted after the last 12 months."Saturday's appearance came during Haliburton's annual basketball camp, where more than 300 children in grades one through eight participated in skill stations alongside several members of the Pacers organization. Forward Obi Toppin, guard Taelon Peter, newly drafted Braden Smith, and general manager Chad Buchanan all joined the event, underscoring the franchise's support for one of its cornerstone community initiatives.With training camp still months away, Indiana does not need to rush its franchise point guard. Haliburton's latest update instead shifts attention toward how quickly he can rediscover his All-NBA form once competitive games return. If his recovery continues on its current path, the Pacers could enter the 2026-27 season with the player who led them to the brink of a championship finally back on the floor.
Article Summary: Tyrese haliburton suffered a torn achilles tendon in game 7 of the 2025 nba finals. Indiana reached the nba finals behind its all-star guard before his devastating injury ended both his season and the team's championship hopes. Now, with more than three months remaining before training camp,haliburton believes he is approaching full basketball condition.

Article Title: Asked about Virat Kohli, Rohit Sharma and MS Dhoni's absence at his wedding, star pacer's reply goes viral - WATCH
Article Text:
Virat Kohli, Rohit Sharma and MS Dhoni (Image credit: Agencies)

Wedding celebrations in Bihar and Varanasi

Akash Deep's journey with India

Injury setback

Poll Vote & Share your view How important do you think a traditional ceremony is for Indian cricketers? Very important Somewhat important Not important at all 3k+ users shared opinion today 5k+ users already voted today 3k+ users shared opinion today Share Opinion

NEW DELHI: India fast bowler Akash Deep recently began a new chapter in his personal life, marrying Akshita Raj in a traditional ceremony in Varanasi. The cricketer shared pictures and videos from the wedding on social media on Wednesday. One clip from the celebrations quickly caught the attention of fans because of Akash's humorous response to a question about some of Indian cricket's biggest stars.During the event, a guest asked him why former India captain MS Dhoni and star batters Virat Kohli and Rohit Sharma were not invited to the wedding.Akash responded with a smile: "Shaadi ho paayega yahan Banaras mein?" (Will the wedding even take place here in Banaras? )His answer drew laughter from those present and suggested that the presence of such high-profile cricketers could have attracted huge crowds and made it difficult to conduct the ceremony smoothly.Ahead of the wedding, celebrations had already begun in Akash's native village of Baddi in Bihar's Rohtas district. Family members, friends and well-wishers gathered for traditional functions before the ceremony in Varanasi.The wedding marked a happy occasion for the pacer, who has spent the past few months recovering from injury.Akash has represented India in 10 Test matches and taken 28 wickets. His best innings figures are 6 for 60, while his best match figures are 10 for 112.One of the standout moments of his career came during India's tour of England last year, when he claimed 12 wickets in the Birmingham Test against England.The right-arm pacer was signed by Kolkata Knight Riders for IPL 2026 but missed the entire season because of a lower-back stress injury.The injury also kept him out of India's plans for the one-off Test against Afghanistan earlier this month.Akash last played for India during the England tour last year, with his most recent appearance coming in the fifth Test at The Oval. Since then, injuries have interrupted his progress and kept him away from international cricket.
Article Summary: India fast bowler akash deep married akshita raj in a traditional ceremony in varanasi. The cricketer shared pictures and videos from the wedding on social media. One clip caught the attention of fans because of akash's humorous response to a question about indian cricket's biggest stars.

Article Title: “Three-against-one situation”: El Rubius opens up on being “targeted” in MrBeast’s viral $1M challenge
Article Text:
El Rubius reacted honestly after his elimination from MrBeast’s $1 million challenge, calling it “unfair” and claiming he was targeted in a three-against-one situation. Despite his frustration, he thanked fans and gave away his $50,000 winnings. His response felt real and balanced, especially after MrBeast’s team later sent him a cake, softening the moment.

El Rubius reflects on a tough and “unfair” exit







El Rubius did not just walk away from MrBeast’s $1 million streamer challenge. He opened up. Soon after his elimination, the Spanish creator shared a raw reaction with fans, giving them a closer look at what the experience felt like from inside the game. It was not polished or carefully framed. It felt real, and that is exactly why it caught attention so quickly.The clip and his response have since fueled conversations across the streaming space. Some viewers believe intense competitions like this naturally lead to uneven situations. Others feel Rubius may have had a point about being singled out. Either way, his words have added a human layer to a challenge that many only saw as entertainment.Speaking through an Instagram Story, Rubius did not hide his frustration, but he also made sure to thank his supporters. He said, "Guys, I just got knocked out of the game. It was a bit of an unfair elimination, but hey, at least I managed to walk away with $50,000 for you all, which I’ve already distributed. It went to the mods, the subs, and the non-subs alike."He further added, "I’m happy, of course, though admittedly, it was incredibly tough.I wasn't really a fan of the challenge itself, either. But then again... it was basically a three-against-one situation the entire time. I mean, they were targeting me specifically the whole way through. I kept trying to go after RaKai, but, well, he actually just got eliminated in the end. So, at least justice was served for Abraham. Abraham, if you’re watching this, we were all rooting for you, and standing right there with you."His message carried mixed emotions. There was disappointment, yes, but also pride in how he handled things. Giving away his $50,000 winnings to his community stood out as a gesture that meant more than the result itself.He continued with another honest note, saying, "And in the end, karma finally caught up with that little punk. Sorry, I’m being a bit toxic right now, but let's just hope the MrBeast team doesn't see this! Guys, thank you all so much. Seriously, thank you for all the support and for just being there."He added, "Every time I asked for something in the chat or whatever it was, you guys were right there. You’re incredible. I’m a little disappointed in myself, personally, mostly for not performing better, but hey, I gave it my all, and we still walked away with $50,000, so we’ve got to look on the bright side. All right, guys, big hugs to all my brothers out there!"Interestingly, the story did not end with frustration. Later that day, Rubius revealed that MrBeast’s team had sent him a cake after his exit. It was a small gesture, but it shifted the mood. It showed that even in a high-pressure challenge, there is still room for respect.In the end, Rubius’ reaction felt honest and grounded. That is what stayed with people.
Article Summary: El rubius was eliminated from mrbeast's $1 million challenge. He called it "unfair" and said he was targeted in a three-against-one situation. Despite his frustration, he thanked fans and gave away his $50,000 winnings.

Article Title: Ipl Ticket Scam: IPL craze costs techie Rs 1.46 lakh in fake RCB vs CSK ticket scam
Article Text:
Image credit: AI generated pic

Watch Devdutt Padikkal press conference: Chinnaswamy pitch, Tim David’s power & RCB’s batting strategy Devdutt Padikkal press conference: Chinnaswamy pitch, Tim David’s power & RCB’s batting strategy

RCB register their second win

Poll Do you think the demand for IPL tickets is too high every season? Yes, it's excessive. No, it's just right.

NEW DELHI: IPL comes and the demand for tickets and passes go soaring up by the fans. The desperation to get inside the stadium to watch their favourite teams in action in the IPL go high and high. When the tickets get sold out, the demand gets too hig, and the cricket fans even ask for tickets in black. But for a 25-year-old techie the craze for IPL tickets for RCB vs CSK turned too costly and he was duped for a massive Rs. 1.46 lakh.The techie, a resident of B Narayanapura, fell into a trap by a post posted by a fraudster who posed himself as a ticket seller on Instagram.As per a report in Deccan Herald, the techie alleged in a complaint to Mahadevapura Police that an individual claiming to be Sumit Biswal promised he could arrange IPL tickets along with food coupons.As per the techie, Biswal was introduced him as a senior supervisor for ticket counter at M Chinnaswamy Stadium"He asked me to come near the stadium gate number 10, saying someone would deliver the tickets within minutes, and even sent an email confirmation to gain my trust," the complainant told Deccan Herald."Initially, I agreed to buy two tickets for Rs 3,700 each,but he kept asking for more money under various pretexts such as refundable security deposits, additional ID cards and food coupons.Trusting him, I made multiple payments - even using my mother’s bank account after exhausting my own limits—and ended up transferring around Rs 1.46 lakh," he added.Bhuvneshwar Kumar’s incisive spell of 3-41, coming after a marauding batting show from Tim David, Rajat Patidar and Devdutt Padikkal, propelled Royal Challengers Bengaluru (RCB) to a commanding 43-run victory over Chennai Super Kings (CSK) in their IPL 2026 encounter at the M Chinnaswamy Stadium on Sunday.The contest saw RCB’s batting unit dismantle CSK’s attack with relentless hitting, as David’s 70 not out off just 25 balls and Patidar’s unbeaten 48 off only 19 balls provided for the late fireworks after Padikkal’s fluent 50 off 29 balls had set the tone for the daunting total.Their combined effort lifted RCB to a daunting 250/3, thus setting a new record for highest total in IPL 2026. In reply, CSK faltered under scoreboard pressure, with Sarfaraz Khan’s 50 off 24 balls and Prashant Veer’s 43 the lone acts of resistance amid a string of failures from the top order.Bhuvneshwar was at his disciplined best and even crossed the 200-mark in terms of wickets in IPL, with others also chipping in as CSK were bowled out for 207 in 19.4 overs. The comprehensive win also meant RCB have registered four consecutive triumphs over CSK for the first time in the IPL’s history.
Article Summary: Royal challengers bengaluru (rcb) beat chennai super kings (csk) by 43 runs. Tim david, rajat patidar and devdutt padikkal all scored half-centuries. Rcb set a new record for highest total in ipl 2026 with 250/3.
